constraints.ocl:
context Tag
inv: self.posts->exists(x | x.isPublic <> false)

context Tag
inv: self.posts->forAll(x | x.isPublic <> true)

context Message
inv: (self.conversation <> null) and (self.isRead = true)

context Group
inv: self.memberships->any(x | x.role <> '') <> null

context Notification
inv: ((self.isSeen) and (self.createdAt.size() = 50)) and (self.isSeen = true)

context Conversation
inv: (self.participants->collect(x | x.posts)->size() >= 2) and (not(self.participants->collect(x | x.posts)->size() >= 2))

context Notification
inv: ((self.type <> null) and (self.message.size() = 36)) and (not((self.type <> null) and (self.message.size() = 36)))

context Post
inv: (self.media->any(x | x.url <> '') <> null) and (not(self.media->any(x | x.url <> '') <> null))

context Message
inv: (self.sender <> null) and (not(self.sender <> null))

context Conversation
inv: (self.participants->any(x | x.createdAt <> '') <> null) and (not(self.participants->any(x | x.createdAt <> '') <> null))
